title: Ahoy Pirate Garland 7ft (213cm) - Colorful Party Decor for Little Buccaneers - Perfect for Swashbuckling Celebrations & Adventures - 1 Pc
features: COLORFUL PIRATE DECOR: Set sail for a swashbuckling adventure with our vibrant 7ft (213cm) ahoy pirate garland, the perfect touch to any little buccaneer's celebration or pirate-themed event.
STURDY & LONG-LASTING: Made from high-quality materials, our pirate garland can withstand the heartiest of pirate shindigs, ensuring the fun and festivities go on without a hitch.

VERSATILE & FUN FOR ALL AGES: Ideal for swashbuckling celebrations, children's birthdays, and pirate-themed adventures of any kind, our colorful pirate banner will add flair to any event and entertain scallywags of all ages.

EASY-TO-USE & HASSLE-FREE: With convenient pre-attached strings for hanging, setting up your pirate party has never been simpler. Our ahoy pirate garland makes decorating a breeze, leaving you more time for treasure hunting.

UNLEASH YOUR INNER PIRATE: Capture the spirit of adventure with our lively and eye-catching ahoy pirate garland, perfect for dialing up the pirate atmosphere and transforming any party into a thrilling nautical experience.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Midnight Black Ruby Red Neon Yellow Royal Blue Ahoy Pirate Birthday Add-On Items Set sail for fun and adventure this Birthday and WOW your guests with these pirate designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Ahoy Pirate isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options.
